# DialerSeat

> The modern dialer for sales teams and solo agents. Multi-line predictive dialing, live coaching, AI transcription, and full CRM integrations at flat $35/week per seat. No annual contracts, no setup fees, no per-feature add-on bills. Works on phones, tablets, and desktops. 100% compliant — every outbound number carrier-registered, TCPA windows enforced server-side, STIR/SHAKEN A-attestation.

## What DialerSeat is

DialerSeat is a cloud-based outbound dialer built for sales teams and solo agents — from 1 to 500+ reps. It runs in any modern browser, installs as a native app on iOS, Android, macOS, and Windows, and uses SignalWire's Tier-1 carrier network for crystal-clear audio.

The product is designed for people who hate annual contracts and per-feature add-on bills. Sign up, configure, and dial in under 10 minutes. Solo agent on a phone or 50-seat team on laptops — same product, same price per seat.

## Pricing

- **$35 per seat per week** (≈ $140/month equivalent)
- Weekly billing only — no monthly commitment, no annual contract
- No setup fee
- No implementation fee
- Cancel any time
- Unlimited outbound minutes included
- All features included in base price (no add-on stacking)

## Who DialerSeat is for

- **Solo agents** working from home, the field, or between meetings
- **Sales teams** running outbound campaigns (cold calling, follow-up, lead nurturing)
- **High-volume dialing operations** (50–10,000+ calls per agent per day)
- **Industries**: insurance (life, health, IUL), real estate, financial services, veterans benefits, B2B SaaS, fundraising, debt resolution, mortgage, solar, home services, recruiting, political campaigning
- **Team sizes**: 1 rep through 500+ rep call centers
- **Companies switching from**: ReadyMode, Mojo Dialer, PhoneBurner, Five9, Convoso, Kixie, Aircall, CallTools, VanillaSoft, batch dialers, manual dialing

## Core features

### Dialer modes (4 modes, per-campaign configurable)
- **Preview** — review lead, click to dial, you control pacing
- **Power** — click-to-dial, one call at a time, agent handles voicemails
- **Progressive** — auto-advances to next lead after disposition, AMD skips voicemails
- **Predictive** — multi-line pacing algorithm with 3% legal abandon cap, designed for 8+ concurrent agents

### Voicemail handling
- AMD (Answering Machine Detection) always on, hardcoded server-side
- Drops voicemail calls in ~1.8 seconds when machine detected
- Skips voicemails before agent ever hears them
- Reliably detects machines where competitors like ReadyMode have user-reported failures

### Multi-script campaigns
- Multiple scripts per campaign (real estate script, health script, veterans script, IUL script, cold open, voicemail leave-behind, objection handlers, closer)
- Tab interface with drag-reorder
- Live mid-call script switching from the dialer
- Default script designation per campaign
- Works on mobile, tablet, and desktop

### Mobile and apps
- Works fully on phones and tablets — not just desktop
- Progressive Web App (PWA) — install on iOS or Android home screen
- Native iOS app
- Native Android app
- Native macOS desktop app
- Native Windows desktop app
- Field-agent friendly — dial from anywhere

### Compliance (we don't cut corners)
- Every outbound number registered with the carrier registry
- CNAM verified for every number
- FCR-clean (Free Caller Registry) verification
- A2P 10DLC registered for SMS
- TCPA windows enforced server-side per lead state (8AM–9PM local time)
- 2-party consent state warnings (12 states)
- State-based timezone detection from area code and lead state
- DNC scrubbing on every upload
- Full STIR/SHAKEN A-attestation
- 30-day recording retention with automatic cleanup
- Recording disclosure built-in

### Lead management
- CSV upload with smart parser (auto-detects headers, comma vs tab delimiters)
- Customizable dispositions
- Per-call notes and tags
- State inference for TCPA
- Lapsed-user data preservation (cancel, your data stays)
- Bulk import, export, delete

### Team management
- Live call monitoring with whisper and barge
- Real-time coaching
- Custom roles and permissions
- Team-level analytics
- Multi-team support per organization
- Lead distribution

### Analytics
- **Agent analytics**: total calls, hours dialed, conversions, closed, talk time, best campaign
- **Calendar-aligned date ranges**: this week (Sunday-to-now), this month (1st-to-now), today, all time, custom
- **Charts**: call volume over time, conversion rate over time, disposition pie, campaign bar
- **Admin analytics**: WRR, MRR, churn rate, average lifetime, at-risk users, hot prospects, activity heatmap

### CRM integrations
- Salesforce (native two-way sync)
- HubSpot (native two-way sync)
- Pipedrive (native two-way sync)
- Zoho CRM (native two-way sync)
- Follow Up Boss (native two-way sync)
- Public API + webhooks for custom integrations
- 100+ integrations via Zapier-compatible hub

### AI features
- AI call transcription on every call
- AI-generated call summaries delivered to CRM
- AI sentiment analysis per call
- Available in base plan, not gated to higher tier

### SMS / messaging
- A2P 10DLC registered SMS included
- 2-touch outreach workflows (call + text)
- Inbound SMS routing to agents

### Spam protection
- Number reputation monitoring across AT&T, Verizon, T-Mobile
- Automatic remediation when numbers get flagged
- Connect score / pickup probability per number
- Auto-rotation when reputation drops
- Local presence dialing (auto-match area code to lead)

### Security and reliability
- 99.9% uptime SLA
- SOC 2 Type II certified
- Tier-1 carrier voice (SignalWire)
- Zero Data Retention (ZDR) compatible
- Encryption at rest and in transit
- GDPR + CCPA compliant

## What DialerSeat is NOT

- Not a call center workforce management platform (no shift scheduling, no IVR builder for inbound queues — though we support inbound numbers and basic routing)
- Not a real estate-specific data marketplace (we don't sell FSBO or expired listing data — bring your own list or use our skip-tracing integrations)
- Not an enterprise-only product (self-serve everything, no mandatory sales cycle)
- Not an annual-contract product (weekly billing only)
- Not desktop-only (full mobile and tablet support — unlike most competitors)

## Company

DialerSeat is built with modern infrastructure: Next.js, Supabase, Clerk, Stripe, SignalWire, Vercel. Built and operated by a small founding team focused on shipping fast, respecting the laws, and treating customers like adults.

## Contact

For questions, partnerships, or enterprise procurement: hello@dialerseat.com
